title: LOOP Leg Table

specs.materials: Laminate worksurface; steel loop leg frame
key_features: Compatible with accessory rail, screens, modesty panels, and power/data options (Bridges II platform)
specs.notes: Could not identify a standalone 'LOOP Leg Table' SKU. 'Loop Leg' is a leg-style option within Global Furniture Group's Bridges II benching/table platform (also offered on Elements tables by other vendors, and on Innovations desks at Buyrite BC). Without a model code from BBI's catalog, specific dimensions, SKUs, and finishes cannot be confirmed. Recommend requesting the internal BBI SKU / spec sheet to match to the correct manufacturer line (most likely Global Bridges II, but possibly an Innovations / custom-leg product).
